title: An Act relative to the retirement benefits of the surviving spouse of the Honorable Francis Flannery

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Duffy of Holyoke, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Patricia A. Duffy relative to the retirement benefits for Julia Flannery, the surviving spouse of the Honorable Francis Flannery.  Public Service.
